name: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, inefficient reporting causes delays in benefits enrollment. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and formatting in spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
problem_solved: Inefficient generation of benefits enrollment reports from raw payroll data.

locked_fields.primary_user: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient generation of benefits enrollment reports from raw payroll data.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, inefficient reporting causes delays in benefits enrollment. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and formatting in spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual data entry and formatting in spreadsheets.

one_liner: For HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, inefficient reporting causes delays in benefits enrollment. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and formatting in spreadsheets.
